summary: Complete testing of Public Listings Page and Password Gate features. All 12 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified with Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Password gate correctly blocks admin app at / and stores auth in sessionStorage
/listings page is publicly accessible without password as required
Listings show correct title format (PropertyName - Unit Number)
Check Availability dialog shows 6 months of calendar with correct color coding
Calendar shows pricing per month or 'Contact for pricing' when not set
Admin pricing section at bottom of listings page requires password to unlock
Pricing can be saved and immediately reflects on listing cards
All data-testid attributes properly set for testing
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/verify-password with correct password returns valid=true
POST /api/auth/verify-password with wrong password returns valid=false
POST /api/auth/verify-password with empty password returns valid=false
GET /api/public/listings returns list of active units with correct structure
Listings include pricing array and current_price field
GET /api/public/listings/{unit_id}/availability returns 6 months of data
GET /api/public/listings/{invalid_id}/availability returns 404
POST /api/public/admin/pricing with correct password saves pricing
POST /api/public/admin/pricing with wrong password returns 401
POST /api/public/admin/pricing without unit_id returns 400
POST /api/public/admin/pricing with empty entries returns 400
GET /api/public/admin/pricing returns all pricing entries
/listings page loads without password gate (publicly accessible)
Listings page shows 3 listing cards for active units
Each listing card shows title, property name, price/contact for pricing, Check Availability button
Check Availability button opens dialog with 6 months of calendar
Calendar shows available (green), occupied (gray), past (light) days
Calendar shows pricing per month or 'Contact for pricing'
Password gate blocks access to admin app at /
Password gate shows error for wrong password
Password gate grants access with correct password 'emergeontop'
Admin pricing section on listings page requires password to unlock
Admin pricing section shows unit dropdown after unlocking
Selecting a unit shows 12 months of pricing inputs with existing values pre-filled
Save Pricing button saves pricing to backend
Saved pricing immediately reflects on listing cards
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public listings and password gate features fully tested. Key data-testids: listings-page, listings-header, listings-grid, listing-card, listing-title, listing-price, check-availability-button, availability-dialog, month-calendar, admin-pricing-section, admin-password-input, admin-unlock-button, admin-error, admin-unit-select, pricing-input-{month}-{year}, save-pricing-button, password-gate, password-gate-input, password-gate-submit, password-gate-error. Backend endpoints: /api/auth/verify-password, /api/public/listings, /api/public/listings/{id}/availability, /api/public/admin/pricing. Password for admin access: 'emergeontop'.
